articles.author: Sara G. Miller
articles.title: FDA allows popular sunscreen ingredient long used in Europe and Asia - NBC News
articles.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday expanded its list of allowed sunscreen ingredients to include the chemical compound bemotrizinol.
articles.content:
The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday expanded its list of allowed sunscreen ingredients to include the chemical compound bemotrizinol.
